alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions, scaling global commercial operations and leading transformation programs; positioning as Strategy and Operations / Product Operations leader with cross-functional stakeholder management
alignments.job_requirement: Define and execute GTM partnerships strategy, operating model, and business objectives across EMEA

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience designing processes, frameworks, and operating models for complex transformation initiatives; product operations background includes requirements definition, UAT, and rollout design
alignments.job_requirement: Build and manage portfolio of strategic partnerships; develop partner segmentation, investment frameworks, and governance models

alignments.candidate_evidence: Google Devices & Services involves ecosystem partnerships and customer adoption at scale; positioning emphasizes commercial operations scaling and transformation program leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Own partner-sourced, partner-influenced, and partner-delivered business outcomes; partner with sales to create scalable co-sell and co-delivery motions

alignments.candidate_evidence: Native German speaker, professional/fluent English; global operations experience at Google suggests multi-market exposure
alignments.job_requirement: Lead distributed teams across Europe; understand regional market dynamics and cultural nuances

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformation program leadership and requirements logic design indicate problem-solving under uncertainty; cross-functional stakeholder management core to Strategy and Operations role family
alignments.job_requirement: Excel in ambiguous environments; balance strategic thinking with operational execution; influence cross-functional stakeholders without direct authority

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google indicate proven leadership capability; Strategy and Operations background typically involves cross-functional team influence and org development
alignments.job_requirement: Recruit, develop, and lead high-performing teams; build culture centered on accountability, operational rigor, and customer outcomes

gaps.gap: Limited direct consulting brand and ecosystem/alliance management experience; no evidence of building large-scale strategic alliance programs or managing consulting firm relationships
gaps.mitigation: Consulting economics and delivery models can be learned quickly with structured onboarding; strong operations and transformation background provides foundation for understanding how services organizations drive adoption

gaps.gap: No demonstrated enterprise partnership revenue ownership; role requires carrying and measuring partner-sourced/-influenced/-attributed revenue outcomes
gaps.mitigation: Commercial operations background and Google ecosystem experience suggest understanding of how partnerships drive growth; revenue responsibility can be learned with executive sponsorship and clear metrics setup

gaps.gap: Limited direct AI or cloud platform company experience; JD emphasizes AI adoption familiarity and hyperscaler/platform ecosystem context
gaps.mitigation: Eight years in commercial operations and transformation provides transferable skills; AI adoption fundamentals and OpenAI platform training can close domain gap within first 90 days

gaps.gap: Title 'Head of' and scope indicate Director/VP-equivalent seniority; candidate profile targets L4-L5 Manager/Senior Manager/Lead/Principal IC
gaps.mitigation: Evaluate whether candidate's actual scope, ownership breadth, and stakeholder management at Google align with VP-equivalent responsibility despite title inflation; scope-seniority assessment suggests moderate over-leveling risk

output.summary: Candidate has strong alignment with GTM Strategy and Operations family and deep experience in transformation, commercial scaling, and cross-functional stakeholder leadership at a scaled company. Gaps in direct consulting ecosystem/alliance management, partner revenue ownership, and AI platform context are manageable with structured onboarding. Primary concern is role title and seniority ceiling: "Head of GTM Partnerships, EMEA" at a Tier 1 company likely maps to Director/VP-equivalent scope, above target L4-L5 band despite candidate's strategic and operational fit to the function.
uncertainties: Actual scope and team size of candidate's Google Devices & Services role unclear; ambiguity on whether current/most recent responsibility aligns with VP-equivalent strategic ownership or sits at L4-L5 level
Extent of direct customer-facing partnership management at Google Devices & Services not specified; unclear how much direct consulting firm and GSI relationship-building is in background
Geographic scope and number of direct reports managed unclear; relevant for assessing readiness for leading distributed EMEA team
No explicit revenue target or P&L ownership mentioned; unclear if commercial operations experience included carrying formal revenue responsibility
